meta.intent: Teach that the dock is not a bag of free storage by putting a simple rescue behind a narrow middle lane and tempting side clears.
meta.expectedPath: Use the left A pair and the top A pair to open the middle lane cleanly, letting the dock cycle one color instead of hoarding side singles.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player clears the B, C, and D side pairs first, triggers Dock Jam, and learns that rack sequencing was their own mistake.
meta.whatItProves: Losses can read as self-authored even with no hazard present.
meta.notes: The rebuilt dock-discipline board keeps the narrow rescue lane and Dock Jam lesson, while side pairs and denser residue make rack sequencing feel self-authored.
